name: urnammu-ai-proxy
description: UrNammu AI API Proxy — Claude & OpenAI usage logging

comments.devDependencies: azure-functions-core-tools is NOT listed here because it ships an npm-shrinkwrap.json pinning brace-expansion@2.0.2 (CVE GHSA-f886-m6hf-6m8v). Install it globally (npm i -g azure-functions-core-tools@4) to use 'func start' locally or 'func azure functionapp publish' to deploy.
